Job Description: Senior AI Engineer — Search and Ranking
Company: TalentTech (AI-powered HR platform)
Location: Mumbai or Pune, India (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time
Experience Required: 4-8 years

We are building next-generation search and ranking systems for our talent platform.

Required Skills:
- Python (strong)
- Information retrieval: BM25, TF-IDF, dense retrieval, or hybrid search
- Embeddings and vector databases: FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, or Elasticsearch
- Machine learning: ranking models, gradient boosting (XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost)
- LLMs: prompt engineering, fine-tuning, or RAG pipelines

Experience required:
- 4+ years in applied ML or software engineering roles
- At least 1 production ML system shipped to real users
- Comfort with evaluation frameworks (NDCG, MRR, precision/recall)

Nice to have:
- NLP experience (text classification, NER, embeddings)
- Experience in HR-tech, recruitment, or marketplace products
- Open source contributions

What you'll do:
- Build and improve candidate ranking and JD-matching systems
- Design offline evaluation pipelines for ranking quality
- Collaborate with product to translate recruiter needs into ML features
- Mentor junior engineers on retrieval and ranking best practices
